feat.name: Defensive Dismissal
feat.requirement: You’re under a polymorph effect that you can Dismiss.
feat.text: You change your form as a means of evading a potentially fatal blow. You Dismiss the polymorph effect you're under, and the result of the triggering Strike becomes a success instead of a critical success. If you would no longer fit in your space as a result of returning to your normal form, this action fails and you don't Dismiss the polymorph effect.

traits.name: Druid
traits.text: This indicates abilities from the druid class.

feat.trigger: A creature you’re aware of critically succeeds on a Strike against you.
